description: pure L1 loss (no FFT loss, worse generalization)
strides 332 + fusion6 + Prodigy -- collapsed at epoch 30
3x3 kernels + 3x3 head + 332 strides -- BREAKTHROUGH +3.3 dB val
L2 loss (severe overfit, FFT freq loss is critical)
fc_dim=80 (smaller model, peaks earlier but lower)
epochs=150 cosine schedule -- 34.50 dB NEW BEST
epochs=140 (identical to exp22, confirms 34.5 dB ceiling)
skip scale=0.01 + dec_blks 1,1,1,1,1 -- conservative, less overfit
skip dropout=0.3 + scale=0.1 -- too conservative, limits skip benefit
residual flatness loss 0.5 + skip scale=0.1 -- marginal improvement
8 frames + skip scale=0.1 -- overfits faster, fewer frames hurts
skip1.0 + edge_weight=5.0 + epochs=80 -- edge loss too aggressive, hf>1
skip1.0 wd=0.02 ep=60 -- too much regularization kills skip benefit
asym_edge=0.5 edge=0.5 skip=0.1 dec_blks=1,1,1,1,1 wd=0.01 -- asymmetric residual loss, stable val, high sharpness
asym_edge=0.5 edge=1.0 skip=0.1 -- higher edge weight causes overfitting, marginal sharpness gain not worth 0.6dB val loss
